hero.summary: 21-year-old web developer in Pinellas County, FL, pursuing a career in web development — applying HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to real-world projects while learning fast in an evolving field.

about: Aspiring web developer focused on sleek, user-friendly websites — always learning, always building, and bringing fresh ideas and energy to every project.
Dedicated and hardworking, I approach every challenge with determination and a willingness to learn. I thrive where I can grow my skills, take on new responsibilities, and deliver my best work.

projects.description: Construction company website with a portfolio showcase, service listings, and contact integration.

contact.intro: Open to new opportunities and interesting projects. Questions — or just a hello — are always welcome.
